scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server,mobile -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -n server,mobile -c green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
